incidents.title: Workers not connected; Andy developer cannot restart workers; push task blocked

summary.symptom: Workers are not connected and I don't have access to restart them. To restart the push task: start worker containers manually via deployment system, then I will dispatch push task. Alternative: push branches manually from local environment.
summary.impact: Valid worker output can be produced after auto-fail, but DB status remains failed because failed->review_requested transition is blocked; Andy reports workers disconnected and re-dispatch loops
summary.next_action: Implement watchdog guard for in-flight worker processing/repair handoff and optionally track no-container elapsed separately; then re-run probe + real multi-step dispatch and confirm no invalid transition logs

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-01 analysis: running_without_container failures are frequently triggered during worker completion handoff (primary run end -> repair run start) once run age > 5m. Example run phase1-auth-gateway-20260228 auto-failed at 11:48:52Z, then repair completed and contract validated but transition failed->review_requested was rejected. Also confirmed data/ipc/andy-developer/available_groups.json groups=[] is expected for non-main lanes.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-02: Added queued cursor grace gate to WorkerRunSupervisor (queued_stale_before_spawn now requires age>=queuedCursorGraceMs, default 10m). Also wired explicit runId handoff host->container-runner->agent-runner and guarded simple Andy greeting cursor on send failure. Validation: vitest src/worker-run-supervisor.test.ts + src/jarvis-worker-dispatch.test.ts (86/86 pass), npm run typecheck pass.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-02: New Wi-Fi + stale Tailscale DNS path caused EAI_AGAIN in andy-developer (api.minimax.io). Host resolver had supplemental 100.100.100.100 (utun5). Applied Wi-Fi DNS 1.1.1.1/8.8.8.8 and full Apple Container reset (container system stop/start, builder start), then restarted com.nanoclaw. Verification: container TCP to 1.1.1.1:443 OK and container DNS lookup api.minimax.io OK.

incidents.title: Andy greeting delayed after hi due to no-output run

summary.symptom: Andy greeting delayed after hi due to no-output run
summary.impact: User pings in Andy-Developer can be consumed without timely reply; perceived responsiveness is poor and trust in lane health degrades.
summary.next_action: Add a fast-path greeting handler for simple salutations in andy-developer before heavy workflow logic, and add watchdog handling that aborts/stops no-output Andy runs earlier with immediate fallback reply.

notes.author: user
notes.text: reported: Andy greeting delayed after hi due to no-output run
